channel.title: Dns on Systology
channel.description: Recent content in Dns on Systology

item.title: Distributed Web Crawler
item.description: A highly resilient architectural design for a Google-scale web crawler; heavily focusing on breadth-first search (BFS), extensive DNS resolution caching, and polite handling of malicious domains.

item.title: Networking & Services
item.description: Operational guidance for resilient networked services; detailing robust API contracts, exponential retries with jitter, sliding-window rate limiting, strict timeout budgets, connection pooling, and mutual TLS.
